greeting.line: The library grew another wing last night. I catalogued it. I always catalogue it.
greeting.line_friendly: I'll show you the wing that grew last night.
greeting.line_hostile: The exit map is sealed. So is this conversation.

lore.line: I know where everything is. I can point you to any answer you want. I just can't walk to the exit. I've mapped it, you understand. I know exactly where it is.
